code:
import io
import list
import string

fn byte_at_or(_ s: String, _ i: Int, _ default: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    default
  end
end

fn get_or(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int, _ default: Int) -> Int
  match xs.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    default
  end
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut running = true
  while running
    mut skip = true
    while skip
      if i >= n
        skip = false
      else
        let b = byte_at_or(s, i, -1)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
          i = i + 1
        else
          skip = false
        end
      end
    end
    if i >= n
      running = false
    else
      mut sign = 1
      let first = byte_at_or(s, i, -1)
      if first == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if first == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut num = 0
      mut has_digit = false
      mut parsing = true
      while parsing
        if i >= n
          parsing = false
        else
          let b = byte_at_or(s, i, -1)
          if b >= 48 and b <= 57
            num = num * 10 + (b - 48)
            has_digit = true
            i = i + 1
          else
            parsing = false
          end
        end
      end
      if has_digit
        result = list.push(result, num * sign)
      else
        i = i + 1
      end
    end
  end
  result
end

fn intersection(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = a.len()
  while i < n
    let v = get_or(a, i, 0)
    if list.contains(b, v) and not list.contains(result, v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_asc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut done = false
  while not done
    let rn = remaining.len()
    if rn == 0
      done = true
    else
      mut min_val = get_or(remaining, 0, 0)
      mut k = 1
      while k < rn
        let v = get_or(remaining, k, 0)
        if v < min_val
          min_val = v
        end
        k = k + 1
      end
      result = list.push(result, min_val)
      mut new_rem: List<Int> = []
      mut removed = false
      mut j = 0
      while j < rn
        let v = get_or(remaining, j, 0)
        if v == min_val and not removed
          removed = true
        else
          new_rem = list.push(new_rem, v)
        end
        j = j + 1
      end
      remaining = new_rem
    end
  end
  result
end

fn read_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_or_empty()
let line2 = read_or_empty()
let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)
let inter = intersection(a, b)
let sorted = sort_asc(inter)
let n = sorted.len()
if n == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let v = get_or(sorted, i, 0)
    if i == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
